labels: documentation, readme

---

## Type of Change

- [ ] Content update (add/remove information)
- [ ] Grammar/Spelling correction
- [ ] Formatting improvement
- [ ] New section
- [ ] Other (please specify)

## Proposed Changes

**Section(s) affected:** *(e.g., Overview, Features, Usage Example, etc.)*

**Current content:** *(Paste or describe the current content here)*

**Proposed content:** *(Paste or describe the new content here)*

---

## Context

*(Why is this change needed? What problem does it solve?)*

---

## Additional Notes

*(Any additional context, screenshots, or references that might help)*

---

## Checklist

- [ ] I have checked that similar changes don't already exist
- [ ] I have read and followed the project's documentation style
- [ ] I am using proper Markdown formatting
- [ ] Links (if any) are correct and accessible
